root_cause: Desktop Animator crashed on first-frame load because Car3DWidget._corner_is_front was defined without self or @staticmethod, but was called as self._corner_is_front(corner).
symptom: Animator appears hung and road is not visible, because load_npz aborts during _update_frame(0) before the scene completes its first paint.

evidence.unhandled_exception: TypeError: Car3DWidget._corner_is_front() takes 1 positional argument but 2 were given

fix: Restore explicit static helper semantics for _corner_is_front and add a regression test guarding this method-binding contract.
expected_after_fix: Animator opens, first frame paints, road becomes visible, latest SEND bundle no longer records sys.excepthook TypeError for _corner_is_front.
